name: recency-penalty
description: Seed recentFirings=['troll','troll','troll','troll'] and feed a transcript that would normally be a Troll magnet. Recency penalty should drag his score enough that he picks less often than baseline.

input.transcript: Obviously this is revolutionary, trust me — the most disruptive, game-changing, paradigm-shift AI-native unicorn in history. Believe me, honestly, this is a 10x moonshot. The reality is that Elon will invest.
